errors.email: This email is not authorised for this system.
errors.send: Could not send the code — try again in a minute.
errors.code: That code didn't match. Check it and try again.

backup.title: Backup
backup.note: Downloads every table as one JSON file. Statement PDFs stay in storage and Dropbox.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions & recurring

tiles.commitmentNote: {count, plural, =0 {no active fixed subscriptions} one {# active fixed subscription} other {# active fixed subscriptions}}

subscriptions.gapNote: A recurrence shows as ended where statements are missing (e.g. the 2025 gap) — chains relink automatically when those statements are uploaded.
subscriptions.variableNote: Monthly cadence but no fixed price — usage-based bills or coincidental monthly visits. Not counted in the commitment.

categories.note: Rename any category (both languages). Delete is available only while nothing uses it — recategorise or re-map first.

errors.duplicate: A category with that English name already exists.
errors.inuse: That category is still used by transactions or merchant rules — re-map them first.

aliases.schemaMissing: The merchant_aliases table is not set up yet — paste schema-phase2c.sql into the Supabase SQL Editor and reload.
aliases.createNote: Tick the terminal-name variants that are really one merchant, give them one name, and merge. Nothing is rewritten — merges apply instantly everywhere and can be undone here.

board.hint: Drag a merchant onto another category to move it — the rule and every matching transaction follow.
board.empty: No merchants yet — drop one here.

duedates.title: My calendar
duedates.listNote: Each card's latest statement cycle. Recording payments happens on the dashboard.
duedates.empty: No due dates on record yet.

coverage.title: Statement uploads by month
coverage.note: How many statements you uploaded each month. A 0 or a lower-than-usual number means a statement may be missing — hover a month to see which statements it holds.
coverage.legend: Green = 3 or more · amber = fewer than usual · red = none that month.

filters.reportTitle: Excel summary report for the current filters

notes.transfers: Wallet transfers are excluded from spending totals (owner decision Q1).
notes.refunds: Refunds are their own series and are never netted into category totals.

owed.title: Owed to me
owed.empty: Nothing here yet. Categorise a transaction as "Paying on Behalf" and it shows up here to track repayment.

tiles.outstandingNote: {count, plural, one {# unpaid item} other {# unpaid items}}

costs.title: What your cards cost you
costs.worsenedAlert: Interest tier WORSENED on the latest statement: {cards}. Late payments now cost more on every ringgit of balance.

byCard.title: By card and year
byCard.note: Late charges, finance charges, service tax and annual fees — money that bought nothing.

tiers.title: Interest-tier history
tiers.note: The retail interest rate printed on each statement (15% / 17% / 18% behavioral tiers). A rise means late payments moved the card to a costlier tier.

dispute.title: Dispute window — review flagged items
dispute.deadline: Statement {statement}: dispute window closes {deadline} ({days, plural, =0 {today} one {# day left} other {# days left}})
dispute.nothingFlagged: Nothing unusual flagged on this statement.
dispute.note: Malaysian card statements become legally conclusive 14 days after the statement date. Flags are review nudges, not accusations — same-day duplicates at one merchant are often real.

status.dueIn: {days, plural, =0 {Due today} one {Due in # day} other {Due in # days}}
status.overdue: {days, plural, one {Overdue by # day} other {Overdue by # days}}

record.interestNote: Paying less than the full balance accrues retail interest on the remainder.

banner.due: {card}: {amount} due in {days, plural, =0 {today} one {# day} other {# days}}
banner.overdue: {card}: {amount} is {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} overdue

common.missingProfileTables: Profile tables are not set up yet — run schema-phase2b.sql in the Supabase SQL editor, then reload this page.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.count: {count, plural, =0 {No transactions} one {# transaction} other {# transactions}}
transactions.empty: No transactions match the current filters.

queue.title: Confirmation queue
queue.intro: Confirm a category for each merchant group. Confirming saves a merchant rule and applies the category to every transaction in the group.
queue.empty: Nothing to confirm — the queue is clear.
queue.groups: {count, plural, =0 {No merchant groups} one {# merchant group} other {# merchant groups}}

companies.title: Companies
companies.intro: Companies are offered as business tags on transactions. Archiving hides a company from new tags; nothing is ever deleted.
companies.name: Name
companies.label: Label

cards.title: Cards
cards.intro: Set a display name and a default business tag for each card.
cards.empty: No cards yet — upload a statement first.
